visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair wearing a black top with a red cutout collar stands in a Costco wholesale store. She gestures towards a shelf of produce and holds up a clear plastic container of multi-colored cherry tomatoes. The background is a brightly lit warehouse with shelves of mushrooms and other shoppers visible. (2) The camera zooms in on the plastic container of tomatoes, showing vibrant red, yellow, and orange cherry tomatoes. Overlays with price and product names appear on the screen. (3) The scene transitions to a home setting. Two women are sitting at a table with the bowl of tomatoes. The first woman and a companion wearing a black beret hold tomatoes up to their eyes and smile at the camera. (4) Close-up shots show the tomatoes in a white bowl and a beige bowl, highlighting their glossy textures and varied colors. (5) The two women continue to taste and discuss the tomatoes, gesturing with their hands and giving a thumbs-up. The room is a typical living room with soft lighting and home decor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 隱藏優惠. [Slogan]: 加拿大彩色小番茄. (2) [Subtitle]: 坐飛機來的吶. (3) [Slogan]: 原價299 現在只要197. (4) [Variety]: 飯後水果甜點. (5) [Variety]: 色彩很繽紛.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female characters, 1 male shopper in background, 1 female shopper in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a black top with a red detail. The second woman has shorter hair and wears a black beret and a white lace dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse interior with shelves and signage; Indoor living room with a table, bowls, and a sofa.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female voice begins narration with bright, upbeat electronic pop background music. The pitch is high and delivery is fast. (2) A clear 'ding' SFX sounds as text overlays appearing. (3) The audio switches to a home environment feel, featuring two female voices interacting playfully with laughter and synchronized reactions. (4) The BGM maintains a consistent upbeat rhythm, while the dialogue focuses on taste descriptions with high vocal valence. (5) Fast-paced vocal exchange continues until the end, accompanied by rhythmic synthesizer sounds.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific cherry tomato product imported from Canada available at Costco, highlighting its multi-colored aesthetic and a temporary discount to encourage purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product close-ups, pricing information, and positive review of a specific brand found in a specific store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social media style editing with high-density information and energetic audio to capture viewer attention quickly.
